response.justification: Strong fullstack profile with 15+ years of experience, well above the 6+ year requirement. Current role at re:cinq directly involves TypeScript/Node.js fullstack work plus AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, matching both the primary stack and the AI agent requirement. Demonstrated breadth across multiple languages, databases, Docker/Kubernetes, and a strong testing/TDD culture aligns well with the role's engineering practices.
strengths: Direct match on TypeScript/Node.js/React with current AI-agent and MCP tooling experience
Polyglot background (TS, Java, DLang, C++, Python-adjacent) and strong TDD/testing discipline
Long track record of fullstack delivery, architecture, and DevOps (Docker, K8s, CI/CD)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed in the resume
Vitest not mentioned by name, though Jest-family/testing expertise is evident
Kotlin not listed; Java experience is present but appears dated

key_factors.factor: Depth of engineering craft (TDD, architecture, polyglot)
